'''Norg Bral''' was a hill-[[Fortress/Legends|fort]] [[City/Legends|town]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]],<ref name="Sacrifice" /> the cultural [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] people, located in the region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Norg Bral was home to numerous of members of the Mandalorian [[Clan Bralor|Bralor clan]], and there was speculation that the town may have been the location where the "Bralor" clan name originated.<ref name="Sacrifice" /> Similar to a number of other Mandalorian settlements, Norg Bral was built within a heavy fortification that contributed to the ease with which it could repel invaders.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Norg Bral was first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe via a mention in the fifth entry in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' novel series, [[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice|''Sacrifice'']], written by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] and published [[May 29]], [[2007]].<ref name="Sacrifice" /> It later received a brief informational entry in the reference book, ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', released the following year on [[December 9]], [[2008]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

The second word in the town's name, ''Bral'', is derived from the Mandalorian [[Language/Legends|language]], meaning "hill-fort" in [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']].<ref name="Mando'a">{{WebCite|url=http://www.karentraviss.com/page20/page26/index.html|text=Mando'a|author=Karen Traviss|work=[http://www.karentraviss.com Karen Traviss]|archivedate=20110925083955}}</ref>
